title: Anime Fantasy Character Poster AI
sourceTitle: Anime Fantasy Character Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: original adult fantasy heroine with intense eye contact and flowing silver-black hair. Scene / Context: epic floating-island adventure world behind her, glowing particles and storm-lit depth. Source Recipe Translation: anime fantasy character poster. Preserve these source mechanics: ultra-detailed anime fantasy realism, cinematic rim light, glowing particles, premium collectible poster design. Concrete social variant uses original adult fantasy heroine with intense eye contact and flowing silver-black hair in epic floating-island adventure world behind her, glowing particles and storm-lit depth. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: ultra-detailed anime fantasy realism, cinematic rim light, glowing particles, premium collectible poster design; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: ARIA / FOLLOW THE LIGHT; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: anime fantasy character poster. Hero Subject: original anime storm mage with half-face close-up on the right, glowing eye, silver hair and wind-torn cloak. Scene or Context: fantasy mountain ruins with lightning fragments, floating spell symbols and dramatic sky glow. Composition: vertical 4:5 character poster, intense eye near upper-right third, layered action silhouettes and readable title block; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: ultra-detailed anime fantasy character poster, sharp linework, cinematic color contrast, premium game-key-art polish; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: STORM VOW / ORIGINAL CHARACTER; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: original adult-coded character, no copied anime IP, no real logo, no random text, no watermark, no distorted anatomy; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
